generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom, I always worry about emergencies. That's why I support sensible civil defense preparedness. It's not about fear - it's about responsibility. Our community needs basic emergency training and supplies. We can't rely on others to always protect us. Simple preparedness maintains our freedom while keeping families safe. #CommunitySafety #PreparedNotScared
